reviews.review_description:
I'm an amateur boxer and do other combat sports such as MMA, Brazilian jiu jitsu, and Muay Thai, and I also play A LOT of fighting games since I've been a technology nerd since when I was little. And for me, this game has early access and it's AMAZING. But, just some considerations. 

1: have another type of joystick mode to move freely and smoothly, some people may have stick drift or may feel uncomfortable with the current available joystick mode.

 2:give the knockdowns a little life, yea they're good but they need ragdoll and some realism like their legs giving out, the sound of the thud when their body hits the floor, and them falling down on their butt breathing heavily. 

3: if you can without breaking a meta rule, add some blood or bruises to make it a better experience and more fun.

4: add an option to remove slow motion when the opponent is stunned, in this option the hurt ai opponent backs up when hurt and covers up instead of just standing there in slow motion. 

5:add more people in the crowd if you can without making it buggy, they all don't have to be moving they can just be images.

6: Give the game some lighting, it has good graphics but it's just a bit dark.

Overall game: 8/10, has potential to be better than thrill of the fight 2, this game is amazing man good luck to the creator!
This is a good alternative to thrill of the fight1, everyone knows totf2 is garbage 👎

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your good review. 
We will do our best to provide our users with the best possible new experience.

reviews.review_description: Best boxing game I have ever played
Hope you still keep the beach update as an optional environment once summer ends!

I bought your game today because I see that you don't give up and keep on patching. You got super bad reviews in the beginning, but now I hope you'll keep going and the game will be really good. 

I already like this: The graphics and the movements of the opponents are the most realistic of all the boxing games I know. They are fluid and believable. I really almost feel like I'm sparring in real life. 

One big request from me: please integrate a mixed reality mode. As someone who boxes on a regular basis, I often take the lamp from the ceiling and I'm really worried that I'll break my fingers on the wall at some point. Thrill often the Fight and the other games already have this mode integrated and that makes such a game a daily driver for me and a recommendation for my sports colleagues.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your good comments.
It's difficult right now because we're not at the level where we can update MR yet.
We will do our best to update quickly.
thank you

reviews.review_description: we can't do anything except the online world and training is really disappointing for a $7 game

developer_response.body:
We apologize for any inconvenience caused during play.
We will update and correct it quickly.

reviews.review_description: When I first bought Manny Pacquiao VR I was disappointed, it was one of the worst experiences that I had in VR., but with this new update, it's one of the best boxing experiences that I have played in VR, I have Creed, Thrill of the fight, and Golden Gloves VR. But I have to say with this new update of Pacquiao it is one of the best if not the best boxing experience that I have played yet, with the new joystick movements, and the new gloves physics makes this a really exciting VR experience the graphics already was superb, and the new fighting physics where your opponent knows how to block, Bob and weave, makes the fighting more realistic, great update.!!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words and detailed feedback! 
We're so glad you're enjoying the new update.
It's going to be even newer
I hope you have a lot of expectations.
It gave a lot of support to the development team.
thank you

reviews.review_description: TOTF 1 is a much better alternative. This doesnt offer anything useful and belittle’s Pacquiao’s legacy. Horrible mechanics and horrible graphics. Won’t recommend.

developer_response.body:
We apologize for any inconvenience caused during play.
We will try to improve the graphics and features as much as possible.

reviews.review_description: When I hit the opponent no damage is done and nothing happens
Every time I hit the person it doesn’t do any damage and every time the person hits me with a light tap I get knocked out which makes no sense
￼ Nice game wonderful graphics kind of Arcady but still gives a great workout and very fun to play . Thrill of the fight is still number one for me but I really like this one too!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the great feedback! 
We're glad you're enjoying the graphics and workout experience.
 We appreciate your support and are thrilled that you like the game alongside your favorite,  Keep having fun!

reviews.review_description: It was great until I notice my character goes back to the default settings and my champion belts resets to 0 and no manny in the championship mode.

developer_response.body:
We apologize for any inconvenience caused.
We will check it and fix it in the next update.

reviews.review_description: A good boxing game but leans more towards the arcadey side. Do not expect simulation type boxing like other games but this is fun in short bursts. Would be massively better if there was an option to move around the room in real life and not just use the joystick for movement.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! 
We're glad you're enjoying the game. 
We chose joystick movement to accommodate different play spaces, but we'll keep your suggestion for real-life movement in mind for future updates. 
Appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description:
I knew the bad reviews on this app. Recently, I heard that updated and tried.
Graphics are excellent and the AI boxer moves smoothly. Comparing to Thrill of Fight, I felt more hard to win and jumping movement was not  familiar for me. I hope MR and on-foot movement support someday.
The traning mode was more enjoyable. Manny as a trainer was so nice experience and the training course seem to be helpful for just novice like me and had good exercise.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for trying our game after the update! We're glad you enjoyed the graphics and training mode with Manny. 
We appreciate your feedback on the AI difficulty and movement, and we'll keep it in mind for future updates. 
Your suggestion for MR and on-foot movement support is also noted.

Thanks for your support, and we look forward to bringing more improvements!

reviews.review_description:
I've played most of the boxing VR games and Manny VR has the best training mini games. The mitts and heavy bag are the best, the speed bag is half decent for warming up, and the dummy could be great if they made hit detection a bit better.

I am not a fan of the actual gameplay, as I much prefer a more realistic boxing game and this is very arcade like, but my 11 year old nephew liked this game better than Thrill of the Fight.

I don't think this is the first boxing VR game you should buy, but if you are into VR boxing I think it is worth picking up for the training games.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the good review.
We will add more features and fun character settings.
We will also update it so that you can enjoy new fun.
Thank you for your support.

reviews.review_description: The suck and it’s not fun to use

developer_response.body:
We apologize for any inconvenience caused during play.
We will try to update more in a fun way.

reviews.review_description: Fun boxing game , some glitches but still very worth $ and fun for a bocxing game .

developer_response.body:
If there are any defects, please let us know and we will do our best to reflect them in the update.
thank you

reviews.review_description: Unfortunately, the game only works in training mode. You assure us that everything works, but it's not true. A few dollars wasted. I feel robbed

developer_response.body:
Can you please email me a video or screenshot of your current situation?
This is minjae@appnori.com.
Please send it to us and we will edit it.

reviews.review_description: Tutorial, quick match are not working for me on my Quest 3S.  Training mode is working and it’s very good.  Just whish the quick match would work.  Hope ther will be an fix for it!!!

developer_response.body:
We apologize for any inconvenience caused during play.
We will update and correct it quickly.

reviews.review_description: Fraud. Developers lie. I warned them that only the training mode works in the free version, to which they assured me that the game works correctly. after buying the game I found out that I was deceived and only the training mode works even in the paid version. According to other reviews, I'm clearly not alone.

developer_response.body:
Even in the original free version
Everything should be done.
To minjae@appnori.com
Please send us a video or screenshot
We will fix it.
